| ACTIVITY_DATE | Encounter/Procedure/Diagnosis/Lab/Medication Start or Occurrence Date | 
| ACTIVITY_END_DATE | Encounter/Procedure/Diagnosis End date | 
| CODE | Code Used to Document the Service | 
| MODIFIER | Any Modifiers for the Base Code | 
| VALUE | Value Provided for Certain Service Attributes | 
| UNITS | Unit for the Value Provided for Certain Service Attributes | 
| INSERT_DATE | Date the Record was Created |
